title: M@riyb #4807
definition:
Merib-baal = "Baal is my advocate"

 1) another name for Mephibosheth
    1a) son of Jonathan and grandson of Saul
nasbUsage:

 1) another name for Mephibosheth

    NASB:  perh. Baal is advocate, a son of Jonathan
